visual_description: A woman in a dark coat runs forward along a dimly lit bridge, followed closely by two other figures. A man in a patterned sweater clutches a railing, looking back with a tense posture. Another man in a shirt and tie dashes past, his arm outstretched as he moves quickly.
audio_description: The audio consists of hurried footsteps, distant shouts, and a low ambient rumble.
